name: Martin Heinrich
subject: We've forced the Senate to address the Dream Act catastrophe
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | Friend,

Earlier today, I voted alongside 80 other senators to reopen the government.

As a result, the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP) is now funded for six years, providing the families of more than nine million children with the assurance that they won't have to go without care. This bill also secured funding for the Department of Defense, Energy, and other critical federal agencies, ensuring they meet their obligations to our troops and our citizens.

**But more importantly, we 've forced the Senate to address the Dream Act catastrophe that President Trump created.**

We absolutely must protect the 800,000 Dreamers from the Trump Administration, and I will fight every day to make sure that commitment is kept.

Thanks,

Martin

name: The White House
subject: Open for business
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f2c7cd71543bea89210fea1d62ea272ea4f9a4d86c6a87a8e482bf2ff91abc3b5073d3669b0ae228892d9455e3ea216fffb0018091739438

Open for business

President Donald J. Trump signed H.R. 195 in the White House Treaty Room last night, which included an extension of continuing appropriations that officially ended the Senate Democrats’ 3-day shutdown of the federal government.

The President expressed satisfaction that congressional Democrats signed onto a deal to fund the military, first responders, and health insurance for vulnerable children. “As I have always said, once the Government is funded, my Administration will work toward solving the problem of very unfair illegal immigration,” President Trump said.

“We will make a long-term deal on immigration if, and only if, it is good for our country.”

Press Secretary Sarah Sanders answered questions yesterday about the next steps toward striking such a deal. “We certainly want to negotiate,” she said, adding that the Administration’s priorities haven’t changed: “a solution on DACA, end to chain migration, end to the visa lottery system, and funding for border security—and that would certainly include the wall.”

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f2c7cd71543bea898f1f9bb82a4bf2b5c2b51f4d202d1392320ccacf01c69ef219de7f282efc6d74a4bbd9a39072e4ecf3fdb1fab4f19232
Read President Trump’s statement on the shutdown here.

Photo of the Day

President Donald J. Trump signs H.R. 195 – Federal Register Printing Savings Act of 2017, including Extension of Continuing Appropriations Act, 2018 | January 22, 2018 (Official White House Photo by Joyce N. Boghosian)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump will sign two actions relating to Section 201 of the Trade Act of 1974. On the recommendation of the U.S. Trade Representative, these actions will prevent serious injury to American manufacturers of washing machines and solar cells and modules.

Vice President Mike Pence continues his travel abroad today. This morning, he participated in a bilateral meeting with President Reuven Rivlin of Israel. The Vice President and Second Lady also toured Yad Vashem, laid a wreath at the Hall of Remembrance, and visited the Western Wall in Jerusalem. They will return to Washington, D.C., late this evening.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=f2c7cd71543bea89a8ca26f6977f77719c40519c86c99fc45f5917178bcbd413a478351e05b25c901dcee3288368d9569124b99c05f5734d

Contact the White House |

name: Jason Yates
subject: Tell your representatives YOU are praying
body:
Dear Peter,
We are only a few weeks into the New Year and Capitol Hill has picked up right where they left off in 2017 with a flurry of meetings and full agendas!
With so many people in our country screaming negativity and division, we want to be different and send an encouraging and prayerful message to our elected representatives at the local, state and national level. Nothing moves the hand of God like fervent prayer, and nothing inspires great leadership like encouragement and inspiration from faithful Christ-followers. Join us in a commitment to pray for all elected officials.
**_I Timothy 2:1-2 says,_****__****_“I urge, then, first of all, that petitions, prayers, intercession,_** **_and_** **_thanksgiving be made for all people — for kings and all those in authority, that we may live peaceful and quiet lives in all godliness and holiness.”_**
Scripture instructs us to pray for those who are in authority. And what better way to begin by [sending a message to each one of your representatives,](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FrNdMnjr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180123p2a01&n=1) letting them know they are being prayed for by **you**.
[Take just a few minutes of your day – to pray for your elected officials and send them a note with our easy to use technology!](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fp2a.co%2FrNdMnjr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180123p2a01&n=2)
**United. We Stand.**

Jason Yates
CEO
[](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.myfaithvotes.org%2F&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180123p2a01&n=3)
©2018 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e180123p2a01&n=4).

name: Joe
subject: It's been a while
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
It's been a long four days. I've always felt that keeping the government open is Congress' most basic responsibility. If we can't meet the commitment to make sure that the members of our military are |
---

| | Peter,

It's been a long four days.

I've always felt that keeping the government open is Congress' most basic responsibility. If we can't meet the commitment to make sure that the members of our military are still getting their paychecks, we've failed. That's why, even while working hard to solve the crises created by congressional inaction, I voted to keep our government open this past week. I believe with hard work and some Hoosier common sense, we ought to be able to achieve our priorities without shutting down the government.

Even before Friday night, I worked nonstop with my colleagues on both sides of the aisle to craft a deal that keeps the government open, funds health insurance for nine million children, and provides a clear and immediate pathway to finally bring a bipartisan immigration bill to the floor that protects Hoosier Dreamers.

**Funding the government was step one, but now I need your help with step two.**

You hired me to do what's right for Hoosiers. And many of our families and friends still need help. Just as you have throughout my time in the Senate, I need you to pledge that you'll get involved in this fight and join me in demanding a vote on a bipartisan immigration bill within the next three weeks.

I've said it before and I'll say it again: we need to provide stability for the more than 10,000 Hoosier children affected by the Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program. In 2013, I voted for a comprehensive immigration reform package because I, like you, know these kids were brought here as children through no fault of their own. They play by the rules and contribute to our communities -- working hard, holding down jobs, and going to school at our universities.

Making sure they can stay in the only country many of them have ever known isn't just doing what's right for them -- it's right for Indiana, and it's right for the nation.

The compromise I helped broker to re-open the government on Monday came with a firm commitment to address legislation that protects DACA recipients. It's time to hold Congress accountable. Now more than ever, we need you to continue to make calls, write letters, and email your Members of Congress. They need to hear from everyone. I'm counting on you.

I promise to always put Hoosiers first. Thanks for sticking with me.

\-- Joe

Friend,

When the Trump administration exempted Florida from their offshore drilling proposal, they admitted that offshore drilling is a threat to coastal economies and tourism.

That's a threat that North Carolina simply cannot afford to face.

Yesterday, in Wrightsville Beach, I again called on the Trump Administration to exempt North Carolina's coast from their offshore drilling proposal.

**And I said we would sue the federal government if that didn 't happen.**

[**Please, add your name if you 're with me.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120367d/2fde7c66/476110e8/1569f178/1512399549/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-not-off-our-coast?utm_campaign=em18_180123_offsho_adv_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em18_180123_offsho_adv_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Please+add+your+name+if+yoursquore+with+") Our coast is special -- it's a part of who we are. We must protect our land, our waters, and our livelihoods.

We've listened to the experts. We know that opening up our coast to drilling would put our economy, our environment, and our coastal communities at risk with little potential for long-term gain.

This is just a bad deal for North Carolina.

**[Add your name here if you're against drilling off of North Carolina's coast.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/120367d/2fde7c66/476110e8/1569f17b/1512399549/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-not-off-our-coast?utm_campaign=em18_180123_offsho_adv_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em18_180123_offsho_adv_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+here+if+youre+against+dril")**

Roy

And I said we would sue the federal government if that didn 't happen. "+" Our coast is special -- it's a part of who we are. We must protect our land, our waters, and our livelihoods. We've listened to the experts. We know that opening up our coast to drilling would put our economy, our environment, and our coastal communities at risk with little potential for long-term gain. This is just a bad deal for North Carolina. "" Thanks for your support, Roy | | "" * Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Roy Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 United States

name: Russ Feingold, LegitAction
subject: An appointment we can’t accept
body:
[ Legit ]LegitAction

Friend,

The Trump administration wants a proponent of gerrymandering to take
charge of the Census Bureau. They’re openly attempting to corrupt one
of our oldest institutions to manipulate the census so they can
undermine voting rights enforcement and fair electoral maps.

Thousands of Legit supporters have already signed onto a petition to
say: an opponent of voting rights like Thomas Brunell has no place at
the U.S. Census Bureau. [ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/oppose_brunell_nomination/?t=1002&akid=566%2E356062%2EAvDchy ]Will you add your name?

With so many threats to our democratic legitimacy angling for our
attention, the administration would love Brunell’s appointment to slip
through quietly so he can start exploiting the census to the advantage
of his Republican allies. We won’t let that happen.

[ https://act.legitaction.com/sign/oppose_brunell_nomination/?t=1003&akid=566%2E356062%2EAvDchy ]Add your name to LegitAction’s petition today. Oppose Thomas
Brunell’s appointment as deputy director of the U.S. Census Bureau.

The louder our resistance, the more effectively we strip Brunell’s
appointment of any shred of false legitimacy it may have.

Thank you for standing up for democratic legitimacy today,

Russ Feingold
LegitAction

subject: I'm with Leah
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate

For the first time in a decade, we have a president in the White House who’s working for you. You’ve already seen the benefits of that in a big way

Friend,

For the first time in a decade, we have a president in the White House who’s working for you.

You’ve already seen the benefits of that in a big way with tax reform.

But to keep these wins coming, we need senators in Washington who are going to fight alongside him.

[**That’s why I’m officially announcing my support for Leah Vukmir for Senate, and asking you to join me by chipping in $25 today.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b20e2e18a094ae1b2103b0ae9e4f73b&_e=2msoakmgRHUbccLq4ZrYB9AqhdlEDlaThBzEttI6OLxuRtxV3tMxpbwoRsV9ZorpBX1u7E2N55hwVtsC_XTvxZpDCOYTKs9YBUugWh1scCVviCPoG3T1BvOpXSrX7F_pi70bGqAMxeCWvJWMxiQaKnY5bcg7Sti8TDK3tt0gLgaMP_p37V3m-mF96pCIqkc-sC0xbRKkiHjP6jYqSieH3OHWTsBFxoelPfR_RLNlOT6i8mkDKPi9wiJOK_uTwaIeFQQPEV9Q3kBxA8eVBx1vYkQfbAb8DxS_fMCQKZi_7bo_UjztOQCw0ZtkxD16FXwpTKftkXgvwKRRpxMnV7lb4mSTEDhm0g8FyAskxxhJEDpv9eR9PvdPdHGgcppMPmNCM84fzxyEd2CgaWylRzgW8vcY8vSnxOB-VeNepopLql-mfUy5kgqGCr7lnhZG7Pr4)

Leah is a principled conservative with strong grassroots support, and friend, I know she can deliver on the promises of conservative change. We've seen her do it.

Leah's work in the state Senate alongside Governor Scott Walker transformed Wisconsin when they said it couldn't be done. That's the kind of fight we need more of in Washington, aiding President Trump’s implementation of the America First agenda that WE voted for.

There’s no question about it, friend, we need Leah.

[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b20e2e18a094ae1b2103b0ae9e4f73b&_e=2msoakmgRHUbccLq4ZrYB9AqhdlEDlaThBzEttI6OLz2OYy5KicuGoD6Ydg-EtiFdFI49MJbYx3uZCS_AE78EHn7gL0hyw6ZZhjm0EIyM60ryPuYl77-RbHxUTHLCLzh_c8MOzBbQvOSlFHBShG8-7tBKmeyMGPr23PuJcw8EQyIn5FQbMzFbkh3yM792uhozMXOOLkweiPm5JV67S2uuQmIG2DjXyiR59HGiVUVXnVcGmPxi4F7_Xz04VQKm6dNOnZ98DfMa_3w5TxFjw-brriw8riSffJWRQjOvFFEVALVCdx2S1dEYpkMal3HtUXFHrz9gZ3RgWWoM57cQYtFU5ns9ksvAgDVV6eyx6WPswkN0vu7xQP3tSZ5_EQu4mElxnGWFm20XKtJzxo-4QcjF5ZsTiAAaqNbXB1dgxoWgPpyfr7H7d7n9ev9SQFsIL9I)

[**I hope you'll join me in supporting Leah today with a gift of $25 now.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b20e2e18a094ae1b2103b0ae9e4f73b&_e=2msoakmgRHUbccLq4ZrYB9AqhdlEDlaThBzEttI6OLxuRtxV3tMxpbwoRsV9ZorpBX1u7E2N55hwVtsC_XTvxZpDCOYTKs9YBUugWh1scCVviCPoG3T1BvOpXSrX7F_pi70bGqAMxeCWvJWMxiQaKnY5bcg7Sti8TDK3tt0gLgaMP_p37V3m-mF96pCIqkc-sC0xbRKkiHjP6jYqSieH3Byrp0GlpPEoWkID7xRfQHt-qkbp1EgISEb16KIvKSbUpz30EQxVjvyikiYHlWLGdGRb3vDNalhSxmKahIWQWueKTvjEwOG-1hPeQU4MCE8XSEQgh9EYu-ikr1URzMWt4QPlGQn4Y8u_g20LCho3m2tOoov9hy5Rgziqp2_rB7WMA8AGPQ4-63WOkWn5tJ1sLSC9k9Ka3T5c7wsnT5VF3E8VrkmE6FBuOd4FWtKJtF9M)

But friend, I know we can win. We worked together to elect President Trump and Governor Walker, and if we work together again, there's no way Leah can fail.

I know how much of a difference grassroots supporters like you make, [**which is why I’m hoping you will now join me in supporting Leah right now.**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=0b20e2e18a094ae1b2103b0ae9e4f73b&_e=2msoakmgRHUbccLq4ZrYB9AqhdlEDlaThBzEttI6OLz2OYy5KicuGoD6Ydg-EtiFdFI49MJbYx3uZCS_AE78EHn7gL0hyw6ZZhjm0EIyM60ryPuYl77-RbHxUTHLCLzh_c8MOzBbQvOSlFHBShG8-7tBKmeyMGPr23PuJcw8EQyIn5FQbMzFbkh3yM792uhozMXOOLkweiPm5JV67S2uuaz7U7BeqGp9ctcq72nP3iZXB7Ypks990emp084YT9MGfhhAn2Ia5vpZHLGm8tqOorvHbVe5naXcwepGBkKUWW9YMGKPxayrHZQ3VuL0u1328H1DJgv9RhppyQSFvO63uiAC_DdWXh_Igc6nM5wYBWz2x0EUDJkOHRWWB3VmYEIZq7wM8vmrR7pERf8HM4l49_e4CTEFVMiMH132sGV_VplSi43xhDfwDBToUd0Reb-u)

You’ve already seen the benefits of that in a big way Friend, For the first time in a decade, we have a president in the White House who’s working for you. You’ve already seen the benefits of that in a big way with tax reform. But to keep these wins coming, we need senators in Washington who are going to fight alongside him. Leah is a principled conservative with strong grassroots support, and friend, I know she can deliver on the promises of conservative change. We've seen her do it. Leah's work in the state Senate alongside Governor Scott Walker transformed Wisconsin when they said it couldn't be done. That's the kind of fight we need more of in Washington, aiding President Trump’s implementation of the America First agenda that WE voted for. There’s no question about it, friend, we need Leah. I’m not going to lie — Leah will face a tough battle. Democrats are gearing up for a big year and they will do everything they can to stop Republicans from winning. But friend, I know we can win. We worked together to elect President Trump and Governor Walker, and if we work together again, there's no way Leah can fail. I know how much of a difference grassroots supporters like you make, Counting on you. Sincerely, Reince Paid for by Leah for Senate

name: Jeanie Forrester
subject: Do you support School Choice?
body:
Derek,
This week is **National School Choice Week**! It is time to celebrate all types of School Choice options for students - traditional public, public charter, public magnet, private, online and home school!
Here in New Hampshire, there is a very important vote coming up on February 7th on SB 193 regarding School Choice. Children are not the same and it is illogical to think that education can be one-size-fits-all. While public school is a great option for many children, it doesn’t meet the needs of every family. This bill benefits the most vulnerable in our communities — those of lower economic means and children with special needs.

clean_body: Derek, This week is National School Choice Week! It is time to celebrate all types of School Choice options for students - traditional public, public charter, public magnet, private, online and home school! Here in New Hampshire, there is a very important vote coming up on February 7th on SB 193 regarding School Choice. Children are not the same and it is illogical to think that education can be one-size-fits-all. While public school is a great option for many children, it doesn’t meet the needs of every family. This bill benefits the most vulnerable in our communities — those of lower economic means and children with special needs. The New Hampshire Young Republicans are rallying support for Senate Bill 193 - Sincerely, Jeanie Forrester NHGOP Chair | "Facebook" "Twitter" "Instagram" "YouTube" | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Republican Party of New Hampshire 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 \--UNSUBSCRIBEALT--

subject: Tell us what you plan to do in 2018
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Debbie Wasserman Schultz for Congress This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail
body:
| |
---
| |
---
| Last year, I attended the Women's March on Washington with hundreds of thousands of like-minded activists. | [](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb6/622b7b5b/1911c333/307bb8d9/926456952/VEsH/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180120")
---
[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb6/622b7b5b/1911c333/307bb8d9/926456952/VEsE/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180120")
---
[](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb6/622b7b5b/1911c333/307bb8d9/926456952/VEsF/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180120")
---
**Last weekend, we marched once again.**
But not all of us had the time or ability to march. So I wanted to give all of you the opportunity to participate -- virtually, of course.
[_**Tell us how you plan to fight for women's rights in 2018.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb6/622b7b5b/1911c333/307bb8d9/926456952/VEsC/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180120")
Here are just some of the things I plan to do this year to support women's rights:
* Speak at the Women's March in Miami Florida.
* Fight to protect Planned Parenthood funding.
* Work toward equal pay for equal work.
* Crack down on sexual harrasment and assault in the workplace.

[_**Let me know what you'll do in 2018 to support women's rights.**_](https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/page/m/10113fb6/622b7b5b/1911c333/307bb8d9/926456952/VEsD/ "https://secure.debbiewassermanschultz.com/e180120")
Thank you.
